name: Path.LowLevel.Parser
comment:
Parse SVG path syntax into an elm value

@docs parse

values.name: parse
values.comment:
Parse svg path syntax into a list of subpaths.

    parse "m10,20 A25,25 -30 0,1 50,-25" -->
        Ok
            [ { moveto = MoveTo Relative ( 10, 20 )
              , drawtos =
                    [ EllipticalArc Absolute
                        { radii = ( 25, 25 )
                        , xAxisRotate = -30
                        , arcFlag = SmallestArc
                        , direction = CounterClockwise
                        , target = ( 50, -25 )
                        }
                    ]
              }
            ]

name: Path.LowLevel

unions.name: MoveTo
unions.comment: MoveTo instructions move the cursor, but don't draw anything.

aliases.name: Coordinate
aliases.comment: Represent a point in 2D space with a tuple of floats

aliases.name: EllipticalArcArgument
aliases.type: { radii : ( Float, Float ), xAxisRotate : Float, arcFlag : ArcFlag, direction : Direction, target : Coordinate }

aliases.name: SubPath
aliases.comment: A subpath is a `MoveTo` followed by a list of `DrawTo`s

values.name: decimalPlaces
values.comment:
Set the maximum number of decimal places in the output string

    myPath : List SubPath
    myPath =
        [ { moveto = MoveTo Relative ( 10, 20 )
          , drawtos =
              [ LineTo Absolute
                [ ( 1 / 3, 1 / 3 )
                , ( 1 / 7, 1 / 7 )
                ]
              ]
          }
        ]

    toStringWith [] myPath
        --> "m10,20 L0.3333333333333333,0.3333333333333333 0.14285714285714285,0.14285714285714285"

    toStringWith [ decimalPlaces 3 ] myPath
        --> "m10,20 L0.333,0.333 0.143,0.143"

values.name: decodeFlags
values.comment: Try to decode two ints into flag values. Inverse of `encodeFlags`.

values.name: encodeFlags
values.comment:
Turn the flags into numbers

    case arcFlag of
        LargestArc -> 1
        SmallestArc -> 0

    case direction of
        Clockwise -> 0
        CounterClockwise -> 1

values.name: toString
values.comment:
Convert a list of subpaths to svg path syntax

    myPath : List SubPath
    myPath =
        [ { moveto = MoveTo Relative ( 10, 20 )
          , drawtos =
                [ EllipticalArc Absolute
                    [ { radii = ( 25, 25 )
                    , xAxisRotate = -30
                    , arcFlag = SmallestArc
                    , direction = CounterClockwise
                    , target = ( 50, -25 )
                    }
                    ]
                ]
          }
        ]

    Path.LowLevel.toString myPath
        --> "m10,20 A25,25 -30 0 1 50,-25"

values.name: toStringWith
values.comment: Convert a list of subpaths to a string, with some extra formatting options
